name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, alert rules, and the in-app feedback/ops inbox, in a single plugin. Ships 17 skills (9 area guides + 8 multi-step workflows such as shipeasy-setup, the three installs, the i18n codemods, and the shipeasy-ops-work loop) plus the shipeasy MCP server; all day-to-day CRUD is delegated to the MCP tools or the shipeasy CLI, and deletions are UI-only.
